data.title: Waaree Renewable Technologies CEO Data Center Resigns, Triggering Senior Management Change
data.description:

Waaree Renewable Technologies Ltd ( (IN:WAAREERTL) ) has issued an announcement.

Waaree Renewable Technologies Limited has announced a change in its senior management with the resignation of Mr. Kamlesh Harchandani, who served as CEO Data Center, effective from the close of business on January 9, 2026. The move, disclosed under SEBI’s listing regulations, signals a leadership transition in the company’s data center operations, an area that is increasingly strategic for energy and infrastructure firms, and may prompt investors and other stakeholders to watch for the company’s next steps in filling this key role and managing continuity in that segment.

More about Waaree Renewable Technologies Ltd

Waaree Renewable Technologies Limited, a subsidiary of Waaree Energies Limited, operates in the renewable energy sector from its base in Mumbai, India. The company focuses on providing renewable power solutions and related services, positioning itself within India’s growing clean energy and infrastructure market.

Average Trading Volume: 192,497

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: 93.37B INR

data.title: Egypt Inflation Holds Steady, Undercuts Forecasts Slightly
data.description:
Egypt’s annual inflation rate held steady at 12.3% in the latest reading, unchanged from the previous 12.3%. The flat profile signals neither further acceleration nor easing in price pressures on a year-on-year basis, suggesting a pause in the recent inflation trend.

Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The outcome came in slightly below the analyst estimate of 12.5%, signaling marginally softer inflation than expected and easing pressure on future tightening expectations. Equity markets are likely to respond positively at the margin, with rate-sensitive sectors such as banks and real estate benefiting from a less hawkish policy outlook. Consumer-focused stocks may also gain on the prospect of more stable purchasing power, with the impact skewed toward near-term sentiment and central bank expectations rather than immediate earnings changes.

data.title: Omai Gold Boosts Resources and Cash as Omai Project Advances Toward 2026 PEA
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Omai Gold Mines ( (TSE:OMG) ) has issued an announcement.

Omai Gold Mines reported major progress in 2025 at its Omai Gold Project in Guyana, driven by approximately 39,000 metres of diamond drilling that expanded its mineral resource estimate by more than 50% to 4.4 million ounces of inferred and 2.1 million ounces of indicated gold. The company delivered multiple high-grade drill intercepts at the Wenot deposit, confirmed its expansion potential along strike and at depth, and demonstrated large-scale, continuous mineralization at the Gilt Creek deposit, while bolstering its balance sheet with C$57 million in year-end cash from two private placements and advancing key permitting and community consultation milestones. Looking ahead, Omai plans an updated mineral resource estimate in early 2026 and a preliminary economic assessment in early Q2 2026 that will incorporate an expanded mine plan covering both Wenot and Gilt Creek, with further work towards pre-feasibility or feasibility studies aimed at de-risking the project and solidifying its status as a top-tier gold development opportunity in Guyana, with potential implications for continued value creation for shareholders and other stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:OMG) stock is a Hold with a C$1.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Omai Gold Mines stock, see the TSE:OMG Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:OMG Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:OMG is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held back by very weak fundamentals—no revenue, widening losses, and accelerating cash burn—despite a debt-free balance sheet. Technicals are modestly supportive with price above key long-term averages and a positive MACD, while corporate events provide constructive project/financing momentum. Valuation contributes little support due to negative earnings and no dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:OMG stock, click here.

More about Omai Gold Mines

Omai Gold Mines Corp. is a Canadian gold exploration and development company focused on its 100%-owned Omai Gold Project in Guyana. The company is advancing both the Wenot open pit deposit and the adjacent Gilt Creek underground deposit, targeting significant resource growth and positioning the project as a leading development-stage gold asset in the country, supported by institutional investors and growing analyst coverage.

Average Trading Volume: 922,997

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$935.4M

See more data about OMG stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Indo Thai Securities Converts Warrants Into 200,000 Equity Shares After Stock Split
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Indo Thai Securities Limited ( (IN:INDOTHAI) ).

Indo Thai Securities Limited has approved the conversion of 20,000 equity convertible warrants into 200,000 equity shares of face value Re 1 each, following a prior stock split from Rs 10 to Re 1 per share and receipt of the remaining 75% of the issue price from a single warrant holder. The Preferential Allotment Committee has allotted these 200,000 shares on a pari-passu basis with existing equity, increasing non-promoter investor Ashu Bishnoi’s holding to 200,000 shares, and further reinforcing the company’s equity base in line with shareholder approvals and stock exchange clearances, with modest dilution to existing shareholders.

More about Indo Thai Securities Limited

Indo Thai Securities Limited operates in India’s financial services sector as a securities brokerage and capital markets intermediary, offering equity trading and related investment services to retail and institutional clients through its listings on BSE and NSE.

data.title: Oroco Launches C$20 Million Bought-Deal Financing for Santo Tomas Copper Project
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Oroco Resource ( (TSE:OCO) ) is now available.

Oroco Resource Corp. has filed a prospectus supplement to its base shelf prospectus to qualify a bought-deal public offering of 52,631,600 units at C$0.38 per unit, for gross proceeds of approximately C$20 million. Each unit consists of one common share and one-half of a common share purchase warrant, with each whole warrant exercisable at C$0.53 for 36 months, and the underwriters, led by Canaccord Genuity, have been granted an option to buy up to an additional 7,894,740 units on the same terms. The financing, expected to close around January 14, 2026 subject to regulatory approvals, will strengthen Oroco’s capital position as it advances the Santo Tomas copper project in Mexico, potentially enhancing its ability to fund ongoing exploration, engineering and development work and reinforcing its positioning in the copper sector.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:OCO) stock is a Hold with a C$0.47 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Oroco Resource stock, see the TSE:OCO Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:OCO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:OCO is a Neutral.

The score is primarily constrained by weak financial performance (no revenue, ongoing losses, and negative free cash flow) despite a solid balance sheet with minimal leverage. Technicals are supportive (uptrend with positive MACD) but appear overextended (high RSI/Stoch), while valuation is pressured by losses and the absence of dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:OCO stock, click here.

More about Oroco Resource

Oroco Resource Corp. is a mineral exploration company focused on advancing the Santo Tomas copper porphyry project in northwestern Mexico. The company holds a net 87% interest in 1,173 hectares of core concessions and an 80% interest in additional surrounding mineral concessions, for a total project area exceeding 6,100 hectares, hosting significant copper porphyry mineralization defined by historical and recent drilling and supported by a revised mineral resource estimate and updated preliminary economic assessment filed in 2024.

Average Trading Volume: 290,166

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: C$93.99M

For a thorough assessment of OCO stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Bolt Metals Upsizes Private Placement to $6 Million on Strong Demand
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Bolt Metals ( (TSE:BOLT) ) has shared an announcement.

Bolt Metals Corp. has increased the size of its previously announced non-brokered private placement from up to $4 million to up to $6 million, reflecting strong investor interest in its financing. The upsized offering now contemplates the issuance of up to 19,354,838 special warrants at $0.31 each, with each special warrant automatically converting into a unit comprising one common share and one warrant exercisable at $0.41 for two years, subject to a 10% ownership blocker. The financing, which remains contingent on customary regulatory approvals, will be used to fund ongoing exploration activities, operations, administrative expenses and general working capital, potentially strengthening Bolt Metals’ ability to advance its mineral projects and support its broader corporate objectives in the resource sector.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:BOLT) stock is a Hold with a C$0.54 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Bolt Metals stock, see the TSE:BOLT Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:BOLT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:BOLT is a Neutral.

Overall score is held down primarily by very weak fundamentals (no revenue, ongoing losses, and higher 2024 cash burn). Technicals are moderately positive with price above major moving averages, while valuation is constrained by negative earnings and no dividend. Recent financings help liquidity for exploration but also highlight continued dependence on capital markets.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:BOLT stock, click here.

More about Bolt Metals

Bolt Metals Corp. is a North American mineral acquisition and exploration company focused on developing drill-ready precious and base metal properties with high-upside and expansion potential. The company is listed on the Canadian Securities Exchange under the symbol BOLT, trades over-the-counter in the U.S. under PCRCF, and is also listed in Germany under WKN A3D8AK, targeting investors interested in early-stage resource projects.

Sekur Private Data ( (TSE:SKUR) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Sekur Private Data Ltd. has launched a non-brokered private placement to raise up to CA$1.5 million through the issuance of up to 30 million units priced at CA$0.05, each consisting of one common share and one full warrant exercisable at CA$0.10 for 48 months. The company plans to use the proceeds to support sales, business development and general working capital, a move that is expected to bolster its commercial expansion efforts and operational flexibility in the competitive cybersecurity and privacy communications market, with the new shares subject to a four-month Canadian statutory hold period and potential finders’ fees in line with exchange policies.

Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

An announcement from GOAT Industries ( (TSE:GOAT) ) is now available.

GOAT Industries’ portfolio company BETSource has entered into a commercial relationship with Bare Knuckle Fighting Championship to integrate its fan engagement and sportsbook attribution technology into the BKFC mobile app, aiming to enhance the user experience, boost in-app interaction and retention, and support BKFC’s monetization efforts as the combat sports promoter rapidly scales its global audience and media distribution. Separately, GOAT has retained 1502655 B.C. Ltd. for a six-month, cash-only investor relations mandate worth up to $400,000 to strengthen its capital markets presence, develop performance metrics for investors, and increase awareness of the company’s strategy and portfolio momentum, signaling a concerted push to raise its profile among market participants.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:GOAT) stock is a Hold with a C$0.47 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on GOAT Industries stock, see the TSE:GOAT Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:GOAT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:GOAT is a Neutral.

The score is primarily constrained by very weak financial performance (ongoing losses, negative equity, and negative operating/free cash flow with no reported revenue). Technicals also point to a weak trend (below key moving averages with negative MACD). Positive corporate developments (acquisitions, uplisting, and financing) add some upside potential but carry execution risk and are not yet reflected in profitability.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:GOAT stock, click here.

More about GOAT Industries

GOAT Industries Ltd. is a Vancouver-based company with a portfolio that includes BETSource, a wholly owned sports media and technology platform focused on fan engagement and sportsbook attribution. Through BETSource, GOAT targets the fast-growing digital sports and combat sports markets by integrating interactive technology into partner apps and ecosystems to deepen user engagement and support monetization strategies.
